Author: AemiliusXIV
Name: ChronoLog
Punchline: OBS chapter markers and YouTube timestamps for every raid pull. Use /chrono.
Description:
Tracks pulls, wipes and clears in any duty. Per pull: fight name, phase, boss HP%, first death, duration.

Outputs OBS chapter markers via websocket and a paste-ready YouTube description block. A direct API push to a live stream's description is planned for a later release.

Short resets are filtered out automatically. /chrono to open, /chrono cfg for settings.
Changelog: Primary command renamed to /chrono (/clog conflicted with the in-game crafting log). Short wipes under 15 s now appear as dimmed 'Brief attempt' rows - excluded from the text export but counted so pull numbering stays in sync with FFLogs. OBS no longer attempts reconnect when OBS itself exits cleanly. Fixed a rare case where a session could split into two separate entries after a plugin reload mid-raid.
